# thoth_webhook_test (Resource)

Triggers Thoth webhook test delivery for tenant settings.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `trigger` (String) Change this value to force a re-test.

### Read-Only

- `error` (String) Error string returned by webhook test endpoint.
- `http_status` (Number) HTTP status returned by webhook endpoint (if available).
- `id` (String) Synthetic test execution ID.
- `status` (String) Webhook test status (delivered or failed).
- `tenant_id` (String) Tenant ID from provider configuration.
- `tested_at` (String) Timestamp when the test was executed.
